style: commercial product photography minimalist modern Diagonal Split-Screen style
description: Creative concept detail: Diagonal Split-Screen visual layout style. A sharp, dynamic diagonal line splits the canvas. The left side is a solid Slate Gray holding trust metrics and bold gold typography; the right side showcases the pristine marble top dining set in action.
